sentence: Never bring your qualiche to a Clavito's table uninvited.

wombos.definition: A powerful, authoritative figure whose dominance is rooted in elite clavicular mogging — a Godfather-type who rules through bone structure as much as presence.
wombos.example: You don't challenge a Clavito — his collarbones alone end careers.

wombos.definition: The caliber or standard of something niche — high execution within a very specific lane. Used to affirm that something niche is also genuinely well-crafted.
wombos.example: The podcast only has 200 listeners, but the qualiche is unmatched.
